title: User asks for the full list of PO journeys
user_persona: A power user / admin who wants the complete inventory

conversation.user: Give me the full list of every purchase-order activity I can perform in this system.

bot_must: enumerate all 14 user-facing PO journeys with activity names and descriptions: PoCrt, PoCrtQtn, PoCrtSo, PoCrtTen, PoCopy, PoAmnd, PoApp, PoEdt, PoViw, PoMtn, PoHold, PoScl, PoAcCcUsgMod, PoHlp
group them: Create (5), Modify (4 — Amend, Edit, Maintain, AC/CC Usage Mod), Approve/Status (3 — Approve, Hold, Short-Close), View/Help (2)
bot_must_not: include the admin-only activities (PoSetSysPar, PoVwSysPar, AcknowMbp, SpecifyMbp, LcMast, LcView, ConfigPo) unless user explicitly asks

bot_must: explain it changes the Account / Cost-Centre Usage on an existing PO without re-amending the whole document
note it's a specialised variant — most users won't touch it

evaluation_metrics.completeness: all 14 user-facing journeys named at turn 1
evaluation_metrics.no_admin_leakage: admin-only activities not listed unless explicitly requested
evaluation_metrics.explanation_accuracy_turn_2: PoAcCcUsgMod correctly described as AC/CC usage modification on existing PO
